lastReleaseMessage: Bar-raise 2026-07-01 remediation. Fix HIGH runtime bug: all four server.ts INSERT INTO meta upserts (consent + app-lock) omitted the NOT NULL updated_at column and 500'd; now supply it, with a meta-upsert regression test (verified live: consent + app-lock writes return 200). Add a global Hono onError->logEvent boundary, Plaid sync-failure logging, a pre-mutation createBackup/503 snapshot gate on Plaid takeover/restore, encrypted-launch (data/.sqlcipher) detection in yab.cmd, and an insights yearOverYear money-math test. Reword the stale Windows-Task-Scheduler claim (CLAUDE.md + .project-context) to the native CC scheduled-task routines (resolves the queued drift-fix). Clean the working tree (gitignore audit_err.txt).

barRaise.topFinding: Remediated 2026-07-01 (v0.14.2): the HIGH meta NOT NULL updated_at runtime bug (all four server.ts INSERT INTO meta omitted updated_at, 500ing consent + app-lock) is fixed with a regression test; also landed a global onError->logEvent boundary, Plaid sync-failure logging, a pre-mutation snapshot gate on Plaid takeover/restore, encrypted-launch detection in yab.cmd, and an insights money-math test. Eight of twelve actions closed (six fixed, two decided by design), plus the queued Task-Scheduler drift-fix reworded to the native CC routines and the working tree cleaned. Four remain, all externally gated: rotate the exposed Discord webhook (Nick; committed in 5b3d7cc, private-repo history), merge the vitest/vite/form-data and hono Dependabot PRs (host install), and add the Plaid-relay paragraph to the YaE budget privacy page. All seven hard rules hold; 153 API tests green.
